task_summary: SP24b extends the live desk human cat proof from injected run_watch provider coverage to the CLI/main --live-desk path, makes live-desk fallback fields visible in human details, and sanitizes human counts so raw grouped desk internals stay out of the form layer.

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --live-desk --watch-count 1 --interval 0 --details --output /tmp/mew-wisp-sp24b-human.txt
tests_run.result: real repo-local live-desk smoke wrote human cat output and emitted one JSON watch record
only sanitized counts and desk primary lines matched; raw_grouped_details/open task internals were absent

proof_artifacts: tool_call:1554 added CLI/main --live-desk human cat success and fallback proof tests as a dry-run patch
tool_call:1555 wrote the initial SP24b report as a dry-run patch
tool_call:1566 made live-desk fallback details visible in human --details output
tool_call:1577 sanitized human details counts to pets_total/pet_states
tool_call:1578 added a regression test proving raw_grouped_details remains in state normalization but not human --details output
notes: Codex did not write product code. mew authored the CLI/main live-desk human cat tests, visible fallback rendering, and human details count sanitization. Automated tests use injected live_desk_runner seams and a forbidden launcher runner, so they do not spawn real mew or execute launcher intents. The operator ran one explicit real --live-desk smoke from the repo root after the focused tests passed and found the raw_grouped_details leak; mew repaired it in fresh session #70. Issues #17 and #28 are closed after upstream fixes; do not reopen them for this historical evidence, but reopen if the same behavior recurs in the next work.
